title: AnonimusMC: Ben 10
description: A mod that wants to bring the Omnitrix and other things from the show to the game
body:
AnonimusMC: Ben 10

 

Did you ever wanted to experiment the power of the Omnitrix? Then this is your mod.

 

Current content:

  • Prototype Omnitrix (it allows you to transform during 5 minutes on aliens)
  • Heatblast (it allows you to fly with two different modes, absorb fire, shoot fireballs and attack with a fire tornado)
  • Greymatter(it allows you to climb walls and enter in small places)
  • Stinkfly(it allows you to fly, grab mobs and shoot sticky balls)

 

Dependencies:

  • Grillo's Clothes
  • Photon
  • Geckolib 4

 

Enter discord if you want get support
